parents.subject: LU-13717 sec: filename encryption - client symlink support

commit.subject: LU-13717 sec: filename encryption - tests
commit.message:
LU-13717 sec: filename encryption - tests

Update tests in sanity-sec to correctly exercise filename
encryption.

Signed-off-by: Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>
Change-Id: Ie084e5f68564ff9588841e627fa084cde80e1c16
